system.flavor: You and allies teleport in a display that sends sprays of bright fire, lighting up the sky.
system.effect:
Effect a blast 3 area in range. You and all adjacent allies may teleport into free space in the area, in any order, then all foes in the area take 2 piercing damage and must save or be branded and pushed 1 away from the center.
Effect you excelled this turn, reduce the action cost of this ability to 1 action. If you critical hit, it becomes quick.
